HGSS.304.0000:
Wow, you’re energetic and hardworking!
I won’t get tricked by your cuteness!\f
HGSS.304.0001:
Don’t eat the grass along the road of
life! My personal slogan!\f
HGSS.304.0002:
Together with these three Pokémon I’ll
get stronger! I’ll get bigger!\f
HGSS.304.0003:
Do you think you can keep up with me?
They call me the “Victorious Victor”!\f
HGSS.304.0004:
Jump! Fight! Be like the wind!
Someday I want to fly high!\f
HGSS.304.0005:
Behind that cute face lies hidden
power! You’ll see it with your own eyes!\f
HGSS.304.0006:
This is our team!
This is our power!\f
HGSS.304.0007:
Power is strength! Strength is power!
I’ll use that power to climb to the top!\f
HGSS.304.0008:
Do you know me!? Do you know what kind
of hidden talents I have?!\f
HGSS.304.0009:
A Pokémon’s strength and power...
I’ll show them to you!\f
HGSS.304.0010:
Pokémon’s friendship and affection! If
you’ve got that, you’ll never lose!\f
HGSS.304.0011:
My Pokémon are always protecting me!
So there’s no way that we’ll lose!\f
HGSS.304.0012:
The accuracy of Bug-type Pokémon!
I’m a man who knows all about them!\f
HGSS.304.0013:
That skill is like a well-oiled machine!
The result of the calculation is...!\f
HGSS.304.0014:
Do you know the skill of
these Pokémon?!\f
HGSS.304.0015:
Never crumble, no matter what happens!
That’s the kind of friendship we’ve got!\f
HGSS.304.0016:
That kind of tenacity is common in
everyone! That spirit! That gutsiness!\f
HGSS.304.0017:
On the mountain five years together...
The friendship is everlasting!\f
HGSS.304.0018:
Master fighting! Live for fighting!
And live for the Pokéathlon!\f
HGSS.304.0019:
I can see victory! That’s because I
don’t think there’s any way I’ll lose!\f
HGSS.304.0020:
I can fly with these Pokémon so far!
Over the rainbow!\f
HGSS.304.0021:
Jump to victory!
Jump to the other side of victory!\f
HGSS.304.0022:
Why can you jump that high?!
Simple, it’s because it’s all you can do.\f
HGSS.304.0023:
We’re not done. We’re just beginning!
We’ll show you just how far we can jump!\f
HGSS.304.0024:
Flying is like breathing to me!
That’s only natural, if you ask me.\f
HGSS.304.0025:
It’s impossible to measure that speed!
A legendary team known for speed!\f
HGSS.304.0026:
Finally here! The amazingly persistent
Gym Leader! How much true power?\f
HGSS.304.0027:
Cuteness, strength, and speed!
A girl with sparkle!\f
HGSS.304.0028:
Nothing in front of this guy... Even a
bolt of lightning can come from behind!\f
HGSS.304.0029:
Run! The thing beyond that--the goal
is called friendship!\f
HGSS.304.0030:
The famous guy on the TV all the time
is now participating in the Pokéathlon!\f
HGSS.304.0031:
All right! The cute and energetic Gym
Leader from the Sinnoh region!\f
HGSS.304.0032:
Power... That is cuteness!
Could you possibly believe that power?\f
HGSS.304.0033:
Abandon common sense!
This is reality!\f
HGSS.304.0034:
Power is everything! Power is right!
Power is proof of friendship!\f
HGSS.304.0035:
I’ve got innate talent! This genius is
going to seize victory!\f
HGSS.304.0036:
Friendship? We don’t need it. That’s
because we are already one.\f
HGSS.304.0037:
My Pokémon are always protecting me,
so there’s no way we can lose!\f
HGSS.304.0038:
Such splendid dancing and splendid
winning! I’ve come from Ecruteak City!\f
HGSS.304.0039:
Are we looking at an illusion? The most
skilled Pokéathlete!\f
HGSS.304.0040:
Gym Leader of steel is participating!
I’ll show you steely determination!\f
HGSS.304.0041:
I’m so full of energy! What’s fatigue?
Where’s this stamina coming from?!\f
HGSS.304.0042:
Chance of victory: 100%! No doubt!
I just came up with that calculation!\f
HGSS.304.0043:
Morning is practice, noon is practice,
and evening...is training!\f
HGSS.304.0044:
He said it...
Fatigue is not in our vocabulary!\f
HGSS.304.0045:
The world we’re aiming for is the
championship, that world!\f
HGSS.304.0046:
Flying... Even gravity is
keeping its distance from her!\f
HGSS.304.0047:
The Gym Leader of flight appears!
My dad’s Pokémon really soar!\f
HGSS.304.0048:
We can go as far as we want...
Come on, let’s go together!\f
HGSS.304.0049:
There’s no sky above him!
There’s a sky below him!\f
